sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE THGQMGACIM ( CODACIM INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGACIM PRIMARY KEY (CODACIM) )
sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE THGQMGACIM ( CODACIM NUMBER(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGACIM PRIMARY KEY (CODACIM) )

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODRNC na tabela THGQMGACIM
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACIM ADD CODRNC INT

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DTPRAZO na tabela THGQMGACIM
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACIM ADD DTPRAZO DATETIME

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo ACAODETALHE na tabela THGQMGACIM
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACIM ADD ACAODETALHE VARCHAR(4000)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo NAOSEAPLICA na tabela THGQMGACIM
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACIM ADD NAOSEAPLICA CHAR(1)

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODUSU na tabela THGQMGACIM
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACIM ADD CODUSU INT

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DHCREATE na tabela THGQMGACIM
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACIM ADD DHCREATE DATETIME

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo DHALTER na tabela THGQMGACIM
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGACIM ADD DHALTER DATETIME
